_comment: Example storyboards (director plans) the agent can follow as a template for a given video type. Heavy frames live in this repo; this indexes them. Format matches the skill's references/library/storyboards.manifest.json.

storyboards.name: Tool breakdown (45s)
storyboards.notes: Vayne-style arc: kinetic hook -> claude-prompt-box intro -> source diagram -> UI proof -> metric-card -> talking-head CTA, ~45s. Each scene names the library asset to reuse (claude-prompt-box, metric-card, light-flare-transition, logo-reveal-coral). Static key frames in frames/.
